title: The Cartographer of Forgotten Sounds
style: melancholic impressionist oil painting aesthetic, muted indigo and amber palette, visible brushstroke texture

characters.name: Maren
characters.description: a woman in her 40s with silver-streaked black hair pinned loosely, wearing an oversized burgundy wool coat with ink-stained fingers, round brass spectacles perched on her nose, tired but luminous dark eyes, full-body standing posture slightly hunched forward as if listening

characters.name: The Sound
characters.description: a translucent humanoid figure made entirely of rippling sound waves rendered as visible amber sine curves, genderless face with an open mouth frozen mid-note, barefoot, no clothing only layered waveforms composing a body

scenes.image_prompt: vast empty library where all the books have become seashells arranged on infinite shelves, a single wooden desk with unrolled maps covered in musical notation instead of geography, dust motes frozen mid-air, green banker's lamp casting amber cone of light, perspective looking down a long corridor of shell-shelves
scenes.video_prompt: Maren slowly unrolls a map across the desk, leaning in closer as the notation begins to vibrate faintly, dust motes begin drifting upward against gravity
scenes.narration: She had been mapping sounds no one remembered anymore.

scenes.image_prompt: the space between two walls that are slowly breathing, condensation forming shapes of musical clefs on stone surfaces, floor is a shallow pool of still mercury reflecting an inverted sky of tangled headphone wires
scenes.video_prompt: The Sound walks across the mercury surface leaving ripple-rings of visible sound waves, each footfall producing colors instead of noise, waveform body contracting and expanding like breath
scenes.narration: It arrived the way all forgotten things do — sideways.

scenes.image_prompt: rooftop of a building above the clouds at twilight, city below visible as a grid of amber pinpoints, large drafting table with brass instruments and a compass that spins in circles, wind pulling loose pages into the sky
scenes.video_prompt: Maren reaches up and plucks a page from mid-air, pressing it against the table, her coat billowing; she writes furiously with a quill that leaves silver trails instead of ink
scenes.narration: Every sound had a shape. She only needed to find where it lived.

scenes.image_prompt: inside a grandfather clock scaled to cathedral size, enormous gears turning in slow motion, pendulum swinging through chambers filled with amber fog, staircases leading into the clock face from behind the numerals
scenes.video_prompt: The Sound presses its waveform palm against a spinning gear and the gear slows to stillness, the entire clock interior holds its breath, waveform body expands filling the chamber with visible resonance
scenes.narration: It had been ticking inside every silence, waiting to be named.

scenes.image_prompt: the library again but now all the seashell-books are open and glowing faintly, the maps on the desk have transformed into landscapes with tiny mountains where the notation peaks were, a door that was not there before stands open revealing only warm amber light
scenes.narration: She drew one final line and heard, for the first time, the sound of something found.
scenes.video_prompt: Maren stands before the glowing map as tiny landscapes rise from its surface like a relief model assembling itself, she removes her spectacles and holds them up — through the lenses the open door is visible reflected, she smiles slowly and takes one step toward it
